---
title: "5 · Soil-state evaluation"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scope.** How the estimated soil state is scored: groundwater level (spatial block-CV, per-domain
gates) and soil moisture (against MERRA-2, SMAP, in-situ SNOTEL/USCRN), plus dv/v recovery — with
consistency checks kept distinct from independent validation.
:::

*Content migrating from the "Results: Real-Data Modeling and Validation" and "Validation Strategy"
(results side) sections.*

## Groundwater-level evaluation (block-CV, per-domain)

## Soil-moisture evaluation (independent vs consistency)

## dv/v recovery and depth support

## Calibrated uncertainty (coverage / PIT / CRPS)
